title: phyllanthus geoffrayi
intro: Phyllanthus geoffrayi, also known as Geoffray's Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus geoffrayi include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a decoction.
